title: Technical Support Engineer 1st Level
description:
Deine Rolle im Team
Provide 1st Level Support to our international customers – in writing and by phone – for all technical inquiries related to our Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMRs).
Identify, analyze, and reproduce complex technical issues (hardware, software, sensors, network) and develop sustainable, technically sound solutions.
Process support tickets in our helpdesk system, including correct prioritization, thorough documentation, and systematic follow‑up.
Configure, install, and update our software solutions, including planning, preparation, and execution of remote and on‑site updates.
Work closely with hardware, software engineering, and assembly teams to efficiently resolve technical inquiries and ensure customer‑oriented solutions.
Take part in 24/7 on‑call duty to provide rapid, competent support for critical customer issues.
Career perspective: Opportunity to progress into 2nd Level Support, including deeper error analysis, direct collaboration with R&D, and higher technical responsibility.

Unser Angebot
Salary starting at € 3,267 gross per month according to the IT collective agreement, based on a full-time employment.
Willingness to pay above depending on qualifications and professional experience.
AGILOX offers numerous benefits, which are not all listed below.
Benefits may vary depending on the role or location, for example, home office may not be possible in certain areas.

Unsere Erwartungen an dich:
Qualifikationen
Solid technical understanding of mechatronic systems, sensors, software configuration, and network technology.
Fast comprehension, structured and analytical mindset, and a solution‑oriented approach.
Strong customer focus and clear, understandable communication – even in technically complex situations.
Very good German and English skills, both written and spoken.

Erfahrung
Professional experience in technical support – ideally in robotics, automation, or industrial IT – is an advantage.

Ausbildung
Completed technical education (HTL, apprenticeship, or equivalent qualification) in mechatronics, electrical engineering, robotics, IT, or automation technology.

Benefits
Team Events
Handy zur Privatnutzung
Frisches Obst
Notebook zur Privatnutzung
Essenszulage
Betriebsarzt
Kaffee, Tee o. Ä
Flexible Arbeitszeiten
Bonuszahlungen
Home Office
